# Smilz Dental Treatment Facility

> Trusted full-service dental clinic in Garia, South Kolkata since 1999. Led by Dr. Dibyendu Dutta. Painless root canal, dental implants, braces & invisible aligners, cosmetic dentistry, paediatric care and emergency treatment.

Address: 21, Garia Park, Opposite Garia Park Club, Near Andrews College, Garia, Kolkata, West Bengal 700084
Phone: +91 8961775554
Hours: Mon–Sat 9 AM–1 PM, 5 PM–9 PM

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Smilz Dental, services and clinic info.
- [About](/about/): Clinic history, doctor profile and facilities.
- [Services](/services/): Full list of dental treatments offered.
- [Contact](/contact/): Address, phone, WhatsApp and clinic map.
- [Gallery](/gallery/): Clinic photos and patient smile gallery.
- [Blog](/blog/): Dental health articles and patient education.

## Services

- [Dental Implants](/services/dental-implants/): Single, multiple & All-on-4 implants.
- [Painless Root Canal](/services/painless-root-canal-treatment/): Single-sitting RCT with rotary endodontics.
- [Orthodontic Braces](/services/orthodontic-braces/): Metal, ceramic and self-ligating braces.
- [Clear Aligners](/services/clear-aligners/): Invisible aligner therapy.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](/services/cosmetic-dentistry/): Smile design, veneers and whitening.
- [Crown & Bridge](/services/crown-bridge/): Tooth-coloured crowns and bridges.
- [Pediatric Dentistry](/services/pediatric-dentistry/): Dental care for children.
- [Scaling & Polishing](/services/scaling-polishing/): Professional cleaning.
- [Tooth Whitening](/services/tooth-whitening/): In-office whitening.
- [Oral & Dental Surgery](/services/oral-dental-surgery/): Extractions and minor surgery.
